Patient.id.name: Patient Resource ID
Patient.id.description: Each resource has an id element which contains the 'logical id' of the resource assigned by the server responsible for storing it.

Patient.identifier.name: Beneficiary Id
Patient.identifier.description: The unique CCW identifier for a beneficiary. The CCW assigns a unique beneficiary identification number to each individual who receives Medicare and/or Medicaid and uses that number to identify an individual’s records in all CCW data files. This number does not change during a beneficiary’s lifetime, and CCW uses each number only once. The BENE_ID is specific to the CCW and is not applicable to any other identification system or data source.

Patient.identifier.name: Previous Identifier Effective Date
Patient.identifier.description: The date the previous identifier became active.

Patient.identifier.name: Previous Identifier Obsolete Date
Patient.identifier.description: The date the previous identifier ceased to be active.

Patient.identifier.name: Medicare Beneficiary Identifier (Current)
Patient.identifier.description: A Medicare Beneficiary Identifier (MBI) assigned to a beneficiary. This particular (MBI) is the most recent/current identifier assigned to the beneficiary.

Patient.identifier.name: Medicare Beneficiary Identifier (Historic)
Patient.identifier.description: A Medicare Beneficiary Identifier (MBI) assigned to a beneficiary. This particular (MBI) is the a former/historic identifier assigned to the beneficiary that is no longer used.

Patient.meta.name: Patient Resource Last Updated Date
Patient.meta.description: The date that this record was last updated within the database.

Patient.meta.name: Patient Resource Profile
Patient.meta.description: An assertion that the content within the FHIR resource response conforms to a FHIR resource profile defined by HL7 or other FHIR Accelerator Groups. The industry standard profile that is used as a template for this FHIR Resource.

Patient.address.name: State Code for Beneficiary
Patient.address.description: The social security administration (SSA) standard 2-digit state code of a beneficiary's residence.

Patient.address.name: Zip Code for Beneficiary
Patient.address.description: This field specifies the zip code identified as the beneficiary mailing address.

Patient.address.name: Beneficiary Derived Mailing Line One Address
Patient.address.description: The first line of the street address.

Patient.address.name: Beneficiary Derived Mailing Line Two Address
Patient.address.description: The second line of the street address.

Patient.address.name: Beneficiary Derived Mailing Line Three Address
Patient.address.description: The third line of the street address.

Patient.address.name: Beneficiary Derived Mailing Line Four Address
Patient.address.description: The fourth line of the street address.

Patient.address.name: Beneficiary Derived Mailing Line Five Address
Patient.address.description: The fifth line of the street address.

Patient.address.name: Beneficiary Derived Mailing Line Six Address
Patient.address.description: The sixth line of the street address.

Patient.address.name: City for Beneficiary
Patient.address.description: The name of the city for the beneficiary mailing address.

Patient.birthDate.name: Beneficiary Birth Date
Patient.birthDate.description: This is the beneficiary's date of birth.

Patient.deceased[x].name: Beneficiary Death Date
Patient.deceased[x].description: This variable indicates the date of death of the beneficiary. A null value means that no death date was reported for the beneficiary.

Patient.gender.name: Beneficiary Sex Code
Patient.gender.description: This variable indicates the sex of the beneficiary.

Patient.extension.name: Beneficiary Race Code
additional: patient.extension[N].valueCoding.display = {corresponding description from valueset specified in .system})

Patient.extension.name: Monthly Medicare-Medicaid dual eligibility code – January
Patient.extension.description: This variable indicates whether the beneficiary was eligible for both Medicare and Medicaid in a given month (January through December).
additional: patient.extension[N].valueCoding.display = {corresponding description from valueset specified in .system}
